name: Pasta with Avocado Pesto
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces pasta, per VT: angel hair
recipeInstructions:
Cook pasta according to package directions until al dente.
Meanwhile, prepare pesto by combining avocados, garlic, lemon juice, and cilantro in a food processor.
Process until smooth, about 1 minute.
Drain the pasta and transfer it to a large serving bowl.
Pour the pesto over the pasta; toss well.
Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese before serving.
Makes 8 servings.
Calories: 152 | Protein: 4g | Fat: 8g | Carbohydrates: 16g | Cholesterol: .7mg | Sodium: 3g | Fiber: 3g
Note: We had this as main course (for 2) over tagliatelle. Served the rest of the sauce over fusilli as side dish (for 4).
